title: Huge crowds in Mashhad as Iran's late supreme leader is buried
summary_full: Ali Khamenei was buried at the Imam Reza shrine, Iran's holiest Shia Muslim site, ending six days of public mourning ceremonies.
summary_public: Ali Khamenei was buried at the Imam Reza shrine, Iran's holiest Shia Muslim site, ending six days of public mourning ceremonies.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran's late supreme leader is buried
